examples: Mr Lockhart, from Abernethy, Perth and Kinross, failed to appear at court and a warrant was issued for his arrest.
Lord Abernethy , born John Alastair Cameron, became a Judge in 1992.
For a more relaxed ride, head to Springwater Corridor in the Hosford-Abernethy neighbourhood (enter the trail at Southeast 4th Avenue and Southeast Ivon Street).
